Localization.Description: The SharpHound (BloodHound) utility was started using one of the following collection methods: LocalGroup, RDP, DCOM, LocalAdmin, ComputerOnly. These methods are used to collect information about local user groups on different domain hosts.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} started utility {object.process.name} whose behavior is specific to the SharpHound (BloodHound) software to collect information about local user groups on different hosts
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} performed actions similar to the SharpHound (BloodHound) software activity to collect information about local user groups on different hosts
